backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Enquiry and Feedback types with CRUD operations: submitEnquiry, submitFeedback (with 1-5 rating validation), getEnquiry, getAllEnquiries, getFeedback, and getAllFeedback using in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features on TrustedElectricalContractorsPage: BM logo background image, About section, Why Choose Us section, and call-to-action section.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for the BM ENTERPRISES electrical contracting website with routing, forms, gallery, and backend integration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, borders, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag, title "BM ENTERPRISES", root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/public/bm-enterprises-single-fi: Standalone single-file HTML page with embedded CSS for BM ENTERPRISES featuring header, navigation, hero section with background image, and responsive mobile menu (truncated content).
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app using TanStack Router to define routes for home, services, quality-safety, clients, projects, gallery, and enquiry pages, all wrapped in SiteLayout.
frontend/src/components/ImageGalleryGrid: Reusable gallery component rendering a responsive grid of images with modal preview using Dialog component, filtering out invalid image sources.
frontend/src/components/LegalRegistratio: Component displaying BM ENTERPRISES legal and registration details including GSTIN, UDYAM registration number, PF number, and ESIC ID with icons.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying project information with title, location (with MapPin icon), and description with hover shadow effect.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying service information with a Lucide icon, title, and description with hover shadow effect.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying company info, quick navigation links, contact details, legal registration, and a copyright notice with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menu, and active route highlighting using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that combines SiteHeader, content outlet, and SiteFooter in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackList.ts: React Query hook that fetches all feedback entries from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitEnquiry.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting enquiries to the backend, invalidating the enquiries cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitFeedback.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting feedback with rating and suggestions, invalidating the feedback cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/lib/formatters/time.ts: Utility function that converts bigint nanosecond timestamps to human-readable date strings with error handling.
frontend/src/lib/validation/enquiryValid: Validation function for enquiry forms checking required fields, email format, and minimum message length.
frontend/src/lib/validation/feedbackVali: Validation function for feedback forms checking required fields, contact info, rating range (1-5), and message length.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/EnquiryPage.tsx: Enquiry and feedback page with two forms: one for submitting general enquiries and another for customer feedback with star ratings. Displays a list of existing feedback entries with timestamps and includes legal registration details.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page displaying a grid of project images from both generated assets and WhatsApp uploads, showcasing electrical installations including control panels, lighting systems, and construction site work.
frontend/src/pages/MajorClientsPage.tsx: Page showcasing BM Enterprises' major clients with a hero image displaying client logos including Dhoot Transmissions, NLMK India, Tata Consumer Products, MSEDCL, and NMDC.
frontend/src/pages/MajorProjectsPage.tsx: Page displaying completed major projects (hospital, manufacturing, retail, university, office towers, airport) with descriptions, plus an image gallery of ongoing electrical installation projects.
frontend/src/pages/QualitySafetyPolicyPa: Policy page detailing BM Enterprises' quality and safety commitments with cards covering quality standards, safety protocols, compliance requirements, and training programs, accompanied by a safety policy image.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Services overview page displaying six service categories (commercial, industrial, residential, power distribution, maintenance, safety inspections) in a grid layout with icons and descriptions, plus a hero image.
frontend/src/pages/TrustedElectricalCont: Landing page with hero section featuring company introduction, call-to-action buttons, company overview with faint BM logo background, and a 'Why Choose Us' section highlighting key differentiators.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, custom color scheme using OKLCH color space (including sidebar, chart, and semantic colors), extended border radius variables, Inter font family, and plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state file for BM ENTERPRISES electrical contracting website tracking four implemented features (background logo, About section, Why Choose Us section, and CTA section) and four pending feature requests with the same content.
